documents.topic: Is it mathematically sound to associate a Count type with ordinal types, where Ordinal.Count = Cardinal? Distance between two ordinal positions yielding cardinal quantity. Tier 2.

Mechanical rename Ordinal.rawValue → Ordinal.underlying mirroring upstream Carrier protocol's renaming. Per cohort policy C3 (2026-05-09): DEFERRED-WITH-RATIONALE — rename scheduled but unscoped; the cosmetic alignment lands when the cardinal/ordinal/affine cohort coordinates a joint break, not unilaterally.
documents.statusDetail: Cohort policy C3 (2026-05-09): rawValue stance preserved across 0.x; rename scheduled but unscoped.
